ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was transferred */,
  "consideration_amount" TEXT /* Amount considered for the property */,
  "grantor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grantor involved in the transaction */,
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grantee involved in the transaction */,
  "deed_reference" TEXT /* Reference number of the deed */,
  "verified_market_sale_description" TEXT /* Description of the verification status of the market sale */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., resale, new construction) */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_grantee_id FOREIGN KEY ("grantee_id") REFERENCES grantees ("grantee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_grantor_id FOREIGN KEY ("grantor_id") REFERENCES grantors ("grantor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grantors" (
  "grantor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grantor */,
  "grantor_name" TEXT /* Name of the grantor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the grantor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the grantor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the grantor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the grantor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grantor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grantees" (
  "grantee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grantee */,
  "grantee_name" TEXT /* Name of the grantee */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the grantee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the grantee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the grantee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the grantee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grantee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deeds" (
  "deed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deed */,
  "deed_reference" TEXT /* Reference number of the deed */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the deed */,
  "deed_type" TEXT /* Type of deed (e.g., warranty, quitclaim) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the deed document */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the deed was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sales_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction being verified */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the market sale verification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the verification process and findings */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the verification occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, broker, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction involving the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "square_footage" TEXT /* Square footage of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_regions" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "region_id")
)
